channel.title: Quality3Ds Daily Pulse
channel.description: Curated daily news for 3D printing enthusiasts.

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #133 - 2026-05-20
item.description:
♻️ The Modern Blacksmith: Forging with Plastic Waste - Tomorrow's World Today The Modern Blacksmith: Forging with Plastic Waste Tomorrow's World Today Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on May 19, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikwFBVV95cUxQSmNCaGJjWmEwVDU4V1ByVXlXWmlzd2VrVG9mNXQ5LUhpakFFQ1ZDWDV1UVhYaFZVQ3R5Q0hacTBYUlVVa1k4ekJybHN0NVZSbFNzalJpM0o4d1ZlZWVXbmMwUHR4Ul9LeWtBVHJMTzdpelU0SmVpN2FkRk1QcGxHWENTY1JBZVdjRldtT2tKTnFaTjQ?oc=5

♻️ Creality M1 and R1: Desktop recycler turns print waste into new filament - initial tests - 3Druck.com Creality M1 and R1: Desktop recycler turns print waste into new filament - initial tests 3Druck.com Reported by Google News - Filament Recycling on May 11, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.?oc=5

🚀 University of Illinois Team Is Engineering the Fix for the AI Heat Crisis Mechanical engineers at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign have developed a new approach to cooling computer chips that could reduce the share of energy data centers spend on thermal management. The method, published in Cell Reports Physical Science, pairs a mathematical design algorithm with an electrochemical 3D printing process to fabricate pure copper cold plates,…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 19, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Figure-2D-web-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/university-of-illinois-team-is-engineering-the-fix-for-the-ai-heat-crisis-251571

📰 Formnext opens submissions for 2026 Awards program Formnext has opened submissions for the Formnext Awards 2026, its annual recognition program for individuals, companies, and solutions in the additive manufacturing industry. The awards will be presented at Formnext … The post Formnext opens submissions for 2026 Awards program appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Formnext-Award-trophies-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/formnext-opens-submissions-for-2026-awards-program

🖨 Cave Holdings expands fleet of ROBOZE 3D printers with installation of ARGO 1000 HYPERMELT machine Cave Holdings is already operating one upgraded ARGO 500 HYPERSPEED unit and six ARGO 500 machines. Reported by TCT Magazine on May 19, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/05/cave.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/cave-holdings-expands-fleet-of-roboze-3d-printers-with-installation-of-argo-1000-hypermelt-machine

📰 CeraShingle, a 3D printed ceramic cladding that plays with light For those lamenting the lack of adornment and ornamentation on more modern architecture, 3D printing could be offering a solution. To this end, Studio WE, an LA-based design firm founded … The post CeraShingle, a 3D printed ceramic cladding that plays with light appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/cerashingle-1-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/cerashingle-a-3d-printed-ceramic-cladding-that-plays-with-light

🚀 Lynxter launches food-safe 3D printing silicone The material is thought to be the world’s first 3D printable silicone compliant with FDA CFR 21 177-2600 standards. Reported by TCT Magazine on May 19, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/05/food-contact-silicone-lynxter-food-process-equipement.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/lynxter-launches-food-safe-3d-printing-silicone

📰 Open Bionics fits first 3D printed full-length bionic arm Praveen Gowtham, a 43-year-old physicist from New York, has become the first person in the world to be fitted with a full-length, 3D printed bionic arm for above-elbow amputees. The … The post Open Bionics fits first 3D printed full-length bionic arm appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Open-Bionics-ful-length-3D-printed-arm-03-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/new-york-amputee-becomes-first-recipient-of-3d-printed-full-length-bionic-arm

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #132 - 2026-05-19
item.description:
🔥 Neuenhauser Expands Industrial 3D Printing with Luvocom 3F - etmm-online.com Neuenhauser Expands Industrial 3D Printing with Luvocom 3F etmm-online.com Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on May 18, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMipAFBVV95cUxPaHpvSlhuTVdxVkJsTkhDVnZ1YkRwRjNnMjhDZmZuWEZPQmhhVmt1SzNTZzZsNEF1NGNOd2Q4LUQ5d3RITDNOZklrZXRhR1ZzTjAyTTlxX1JIU1NFaFNPOWlnZFVaMk51UDhHTjR6Q3dIeDdlLTlOSEZLS0k2Q1NGQ2gxWkd1UjdvMmRRbG1FVXh6ekNtb0NoMk5zLTduTGtqSmF6cw?oc=5

🚀 Axtra3D launches KeyModel Ultra Ivory resin for dental and orthodontic applications on Lumia X1 Axtra3D has introduced KeyModel Ultra Ivory, a high-precision dental resin developed in collaboration with Keystone Industries, and validated for use on the company’s Lumia X1 Hi-Speed SLA platform. The material … The post Axtra3D launches KeyModel Ultra Ivory resin for dental and orthodontic applications on Lumia X1 appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Axtra3D-Keyprint-release-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/axtra3d-launches-keymodel-ultra-ivory-resin-for-dental-and-orthodontic-applications-on-lumia-x1

🚀 Zellerfeld and Baron Davis’ OverDose brand launch 3D printed sneaker 3D printed footwear manufacturer Zellerfeld continues to expand its partnerships with notable celebrities and brands with the launch of its latest sneaker model. The shoe, a post-workout recovery sneaker called … The post Zellerfeld and Baron Davis’ OverDose brand launch 3D printed sneaker appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/zellerfeld-overdose-3-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/zellerfeld-and-baron-davis-overdose-brand-launch-3d-printed-sneaker

🚀 Skuld Patents its Process to Cast Wrought Aluminum From Scrap US-based manufacturing company Skuld is leading a DARPA Rubble to Rockets (R2R) program effort to convert scrap metal into structural parts through advanced casting and AI-assisted analysis. The company has filed a patent application covering its ability to cast wrought-grade aluminum alloys, including 6061 and 7075, directly from scrap feedstock, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 18, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/06/CoteLab_82_2025-04-14-1-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/skuld-patents-its-process-to-cast-wrought-aluminum-from-scrap-251525

🦺 AMA: Healthcare 2026 Speakers Announced for 3D printing and healthcare event The next event in our Additive Manufacturing Advantage (AMA) focuses on the use of 3D printing in healthcare. AMA: Healthcare 2026 will bring together leading voices in medical, dental, pharmaceutical, and regenerative manufacturing to examine how additive manufacturing is moving from specialist use cases toward scalable, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 18, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/AMAHealthcare-2026--150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/ama-healthcare-2026-speakers-announced-for-3d-printing-and-healthcare-event-251530

🚀 GoEngineer acquires Latin America's leading SOLIDWORKS reseller SKA will now operate as a GoEngineer company, extending the American firm's presence into Latin America. Reported by TCT Magazine on May 18, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/05/af2f66ca1fad35423b1a3157d033982c.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/goengineer-acquires-latin-americas-leading-solidworks-reseller

📰 VoxelMatters Polymer AM Focus 2026 eBook As spring progresses, we are turning our sights to a major segment of additive manufacturing: Polymer AM. Comprising hardware, materials, and services, this segment was worth nearly $10 billion in … The post VoxelMatters Polymer AM Focus 2026 eBook appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Polymer-AM-2026-eBook-Feature-Image-150x150.png Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/voxelmatters-polymer-am-focus-2026-ebook

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #131 - 2026-05-18
item.description:
🦺 Tampere University researchers develop ceramic 3D printed scaffolds that replicate bone structure Researchers at Tampere University in Finland have developed a 3D printed ceramic implant material that is designed to replicate the chemical composition and physical architecture of natural human bone. The … The post Tampere University researchers develop ceramic 3D printed scaffolds that replicate bone structure appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Tampere-University-ceramic-3D-printed-bone-scaffolds-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/tampere-university-researchers-develop-ceramic-3d-printed-scaffolds-that-replicate-bone-structure

🏠 Ancient Rome Meets Modern Tech: How 3D Printing Recreated Trajan’s Column for the Saint Louis Art Museum When the Saint Louis Art Museum wanted to display the power and influence of the Roman Empire, it used 3D printing to bridge a 2,000 year gap. The museum’s current, reported by 3DPrint.com on May 17, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/326125/ancient-rome-meets-modern-tech-how-3d-printing-recreated-trajans-column-for-the-saint-louis-art-museum

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #130 - 2026-05-17
item.description:
🔥 Glass 3D printing goes viral as labs break temperature barriers - MSN Glass 3D printing goes viral as labs break temperature barriers MSN Reported by Google News - 3D Printing Viral on May 15, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.?oc=5

💻 US Army’s AM platoon fabricates counter-UAS mounts in the field during Flytrap 5.0 The US Army‘s 2nd Cavalry Regiment put its organic additive manufacturing capability to practical use during Flytrap 5.0, a counter-unmanned aerial systems (UAS) exercise held at Pabradė Training Area in … The post... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 16, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/US-Army-FlyTrap-5.0-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/us-armys-am-platoon-fabricates-counter-uas-mounts-in-the-field-during-flytrap-5-0

🚀 Rocket Lab rolls the 1,000th Rutherford engine off its production line In line with its stated goal of launching 1,000 3D printed engines into space by year-end, Rocket Lab reached a production milestone for its Rutherford engine, completing the 1,000th unit … The post Rocket Lab rolls... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 16, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/rocket-lab-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/rocket-lab-rolls-the-1000th-rutherford-engine-off-its-production-line

🦺 Penn State’s 3D printed hydrogel implant cuts blood pressure by 15% in trials Researchers at Penn State University have developed a 3D printed bioelectronic implant that wraps around the carotid artery and delivers low-frequency electrical pulses to reduce blood pressure, and all without … The... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 16, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/3D-printed-hydrogel-implant-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/penn-states-3d-printed-hydrogel-implant-cuts-blood-pressure-by-15-in-trials

📰 Ceramic 3D Printing Applications on Display at Ceramics Expo USA There’s a lot of crossover between ceramics and additive manufacturing (AM). Now, we just need to get the two industries to talk to each other more, reported by 3DPrint.com on May 16, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/325884/ceramic-3d-printing-applications-on-display-at-ceramics-expo-usa

📰 The Additive Chicken Coop, Part IV: Lemmings If we look at our past, we can see how making custom machines, incessantly watching ourselves, and our inability to rescope shaped our industry. We have also looked at the, reported by 3DPrint.com on May 15, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/325223/the-additive-chicken-coop-part-iv-lemmings

🖨 i3D Manufacturing Expands Metal 3D Printing Capacity with Burloak Technologies Acquisition The Canadian economy may be one of the most difficult to forecast right now. This is largely the result of the fact that the nation is attempting to thread a, reported by 3DPrint.com on May 15, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/326043/i3d-manufacturing-expands-metal-3d-printing-capacity-w-burloak-technologies-acquisition

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #129 - 2026-05-16
item.description:
🔥 University of Illinois team 3D prints pure-copper cold plates for electronics cooling Researchers at the University of Illinois Urbana-Champaign have developed a cold plate design workflow that pairs topology optimization (TO) with electrochemical additive manufacturing (ECAM) to produce pure-copper... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 15, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Illinois-cold-copper-plate-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/university-of-illinois-team-3d-prints-pure-copper-cold-plates-for-electronics-cooling

🏠 Mint Group acquires Generation 3D to bring large-format 3D printing in-house Mint Group, a themed fabrication and fit-out company operating across the Middle East, has acquired Generation 3D (G3D), a regional 3D printing firm, to bring large-format additive manufacturing directly into … The... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 15, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Mint-Group-Generation-3D-02-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/mint-group-acquires-generation-3d-to-bring-large-format-3d-printing-in-house

🚀 Tvasta and 14Trees launch Cedar, an AI-enabled construction 3D printer Tvasta, a Chennai-based deep-tech startup born out of the Indian Institute of Technology (IIT) Madras, has partnered with construction 3D printing company 14Trees to develop and launch Cedar, a construction … The... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 15, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/cedar-3d-printer-1-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/tvasta-and-14trees-launch-cedar-an-ai-enabled-construction-3d-printer

🖨 ORNL uses 3D printing to fabricate canisters for PM-HIP of large metal components Researchers at the US Department of Energy’s Oak Ridge National Laboratory (ORNL) have developed a method for using additive manufacturing to produce custom canisters for powder metallurgy hot isostatic pressing …... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 15, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/ORNL-3D-printed-PM-HIP-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/ornl-uses-3d-printing-to-fabricate-canisters-for-pm-hip-of-large-metal-components

🖨 K3D expands MetalFab fleet to six systems across two Netherlands sites Netherlands-based metal 3D printing service provider K3D added two MetalFab systems to its production fleet, bringing its total to six machines across two manufacturing facilities. The expansion gives K3D nine … The post K3D expands MetalFab fleet to six systems across two Netherlands sites appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Additive_Industries_K3D_DSC_3789-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/k3d-expands-metalfab-fleet-to-six-systems-across-two-netherlands-sites

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #128 - 2026-05-15
item.description:

♻️ Peopoly Unveils $15,000 Giga 800 FGF 3D Printer for Large Pellet Prints Peopoly is known for its Magneto X, a printer that eschews belts and uses linear motors instead. The company also has a vat polymerization system, and now is moving into FGF, reported by 3DPrint.com on May 14, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/325968/peopoly-unveils-giga-800-pellet-3d-printer

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #127 - 2026-05-14
item.description:
🔥 Firestorm Secures $82M to Scale Battlefield Manufacturing Defense manufacturing startup Firestorm Labs has closed an $82 million Series B round, bringing its total capital raised to $153 million. Washington Harbour Partners led the investment, joined by several backers spanning defense, intelligence, and venture, including NEA, In-Q-Tel, Lockheed Martin Ventures, Booz Allen Ventures, Ondas, Geodesic, Motley, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 13, 2026. 🏠 Endless Industries and BigRep bring continuous carbon fiber reinforcement to large-format 3D printing Berlin-based deep-tech company Endless Industries has completed a two-year integration of its continuous fiber reinforcement technology into BigRep‘s large-format additive manufacturing platform, in what the... Reported by VoxelMatters on May 13, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/Endless-BigRep-00-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/endless-industries-and-bigrep-bring-continuous-carbon-fiber-reinforcement-to-large-format-3d-printing

🚀 Vivobarefoot Launches Tabi Gen 02, Custom 3D Printed Sandal UK-based footwear brand Vivobarefoot has unveiled the Tabi Gen 02, the second iteration of its scan-to-print barefoot sandal, developed in partnership with Carbon and manufactured by Oechsler. Lighter and more precise than its predecessor, the Gen 02 is custom-printed for each wearer using Carbon’s Digital Light Synthesis process and CARBON BL6 PU foam, reported by 3D Printing Industry on May 13, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/doc_2026-04-21_16-21-12.Cz3fV2wk-edited-150x100.png Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/vivobarefoot-launches-tabi-gen-02-custom-3d-printed-sandal-251380
